name: Chicken Breasts with Prawn & Saffron Sauce
recipeIngredient: 250 g Uncle Ben's Thai Imperial Rice
55 g unsalted butter, cut into small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a large pan and fry the chicken until colored. Set aside and keep hot.
2. In a small pan, simmer the white wine with chopped onion until reduced by half. Add saffron, stock, meat juices, and cream. Continue to simmer until the sauce is reduced by one-third and has thickened.
3. Cook Uncle Ben's rice according to package instructions.
4. Once the sauce has thickened, remove from heat. Whisk in butter cubes and season to taste. Quickly fry prawns in remaining 30 g butter, then add to the sauce with tomatoes and heat through.
5. Arrange chicken on plates, spoon sauce over, and serve immediately with cooked rice.
